title: Remove Mouseover Highlight
description: Remove Mouseover Highlight - Removes the highlight around blocks when the player hovers on them.
body:
## Remove Mouseover Highlight

### Removes the highlight around blocks when the player hovers on them.

Feel free to use this mod in any ModPack (Remember this is a client side only mod)

![Remove Mouseover Highlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c463352101a7faa6a11ebbf4f7e4044d19e2f1e5.png)

![Remove Mouseover Highlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f060024ca0f4b2ef641a46d2067af72c8d8333.png)
